title: 宝塚記念の後に・かすめた指先

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nice Nature loses the race. But unlike before, she
vows with a positive attitude to learn from this
defeat for the next race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She also promises Mejiro McQueen and Mejiro
Ryan a rematch before the two head off to train
for their next race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Convinced that she can now run well in a bigger
race, I suggest that she run in the autumn Tenno
Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nice Nature finds the strength to keep herself
from falling back to her reluctant ways and makes
up her mind to tackle the big race.
